pi_items.source: FDA-approved drug formulations (accessdata.fda.gov, medicines.org.uk). Amoxicillin 500mg capsules are standard FDA-approved formulations available in AMOXIL brand with royal blue opaque cap and pink opaque body marked 'AMOXIL 500'.
FDA drug labels and approvals. Standard FDA-approved amoxicillin capsule strengths are 250mg and 500mg. The 500mg strength is a widely prescribed standard formulation.

Standard medical nomenclature. Per USP Nomenclature Guidelines and RxNORM standards, drug generic names follow the format [DRUG][ROUTE][DOSAGE FORM], with drug names in uppercase in official pharmaceutical documentation. Bahmni uses the CIEL concept dictionary from OpenMRS, which follows RxNORM and international medical standards.
Common API naming convention. Query parameters typically use mixed case (different from database concept names), which is a standard practice for REST APIs to support user-friendly searches.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a real FDA-approved drug: Amoxicillin 500mg capsule. All metadata claims are verified against authoritative sources. Amoxicillin is a widely-used beta-lactam antibiotic with 500mg being a standard capsule strength approved by the FDA. The concept name 'AMOXICILLIN' follows standard pharmaceutical nomenclature conventions used in the CIEL concept dictionary and RxNORM. This is real clinical data, not synthetic.
